titleStmt.title: SII 15.167: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 167. (B.K. No. 53 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the platform of Kāśi Visvanātha temple.

This is dated the 24th regnal year of the king, Subhānu, Chaitra-amāvāsye, Sunday solar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1223 A.D., April 2. There was no solar eclipse on this date. The mention of Saṅkramaṇa is evidently a mistake.
It registers the gift of income from sales made by the local merchants to the god Madhusūdana of Lokkiguṇḍi. The inscription is partly damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 221 below.
div.p:
© tribhuvanakella manōharanabhinavacakrīśa mū
¨rtti nṟipakuḷatiḷakaṁ vibhavaguṇānvitanītaṁ prabhaviṁ
daṁ dhīra vīra siṁhaṇadēva . svasti śrīmatu yādavanā
rāyaṇa bhujabaḷapratāpacakrava¨rtti śrī siṁgha
ṇa dēvava¨rṣada 24 neya svabhānu saṁvatsarada caitradamā
vāsye Ādityavāra sū¨ryyagrahaṇa Uttarāya
ṇa saṁkramāṇa vyatiyapātadaṁdu śrī madhusūda
nadēva¨rgge śrīmatu lokkiguṁḍiya¨rccina gēṇi sama
sta nakharaṁgaḷu mukhyavāgi
ṭṭeya biṭṭaru tāṁvu gāravaṁ bēḍidaṁ hoṁge
nūṟakke vīsa kāṇi 2 mu[maṁ Ā]caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ
naḍavaṁtāgi biṭṭaru Iṁtī dha¨rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rggeThis letter is engraved above the line.
vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalu sahasra vēdapāraga
rappa sabrāhmaṇa¨rgge sadakṣiṇe sahita gōsahasra
vaṁ koṭṭa phalamakku Iṁtidanaḷidava[¨rgge puṇyakṣē
traṁgaḷoḷu sāvira kavileyaṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁ
da dōṣamakku
Digital edition of SII 15.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
